decks.notes: The main concept of this deck revolves around using a combination of discard spells, looting effects, and reanimation spells to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield for a powerful attack. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while setting up its own game-winning combos with cards like Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones. It also uses counter spells and removal to control the board and protect its key combo pieces.

The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Shardless Agent and Violent Outburst to quickly and efficiently put powerful creatures into the graveyard, then casting Living End to bring them all back onto the battlefield. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a sudden influx of creatures while disrupting their game plan with cards like Endurance and Force of Negation. By constantly cycling through the deck and manipulating the graveyard, the deck aims to create a consistent and powerful combo that can quickly secure the game.

This deck focuses on using instant-speed reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance and Faithful Mending to bring back powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier from the graveyard. By utilizing cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Force of Negation to protect its combo pieces, the deck aims to create explosive turns where it can overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats. Additionally, the deck includes disruption in the form of Thoughtseize and counterspells to control the game and ensure its combo can come together smoothly.

The deck aims to establish board control and disrupt the opponent's strategy with cards like Force of Negation and Subtlety, while generating value through creatures like Shardless Agent and Generous Ent. By cycling cards like Street Wraith and searching for combo pieces with Misty Rainforest, the player can quickly assemble the resources needed to cast Living End and reanimate a powerful board of creatures from the graveyard. Endurance and Boseiju, Who Endures provide additional protection against disruption, allowing the player to overwhelm their opponent with a sudden and impactful combo.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana using Amulet of Vigor and bouncing lands like Simic Growth Chamber to play big threats like Primeval Titan. It aims to assemble the combo of Amulet of Vigor, Primeval Titan, and lands like Gruul Turf to generate a large number of land drops and mana to win the game with cards like Scapeshift. The deck utilizes various utility lands like Boseiju, Who Endures and Urza's Saga to support its game plan and outvalue opponents with powerful creatures like Cultivator Colossus.

The main focus of this deck is to use Ruby Medallion and other red mana-generating cards to quickly cast spells such as Ral, Monsoon Mage and Grapeshot in order to deal damage to the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Past in Flames and Flashback to help reuse spells from the graveyard, along with Wish to search for specific cards when needed. The deck aims to create a powerful combo of spells that can overwhelm the opponent and win the game in a fast and efficient manner.

This UW Control deck focuses on using counterspells and removal spells to control the game while generating card advantage through Teferi, Time Raveler and Meticulous Archive. The deck also includes versatile cards like Prismatic Ending and Isochron Scepter to handle a variety of threats. The companion Kaheera, the Orphanguard provides additional value and synergy with the deck's creature cards. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's game plan, protect key cards, and eventually win through a combination of card advantage and powerful finishers like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Hall of Storm Giants.

The deck focuses on assembling a variety of creatures through creature tutoring spells like Green Sun's Zenith and Chord of Calling to create powerful synergies and combos. It also utilizes graveyard recursion with cards like Yawgmoth, Thran Physician and Strangleroot Geist. The main strategy is to toolbox through the deck, searching for the right creature at the right time to disrupt the opponent's game plan while building a strong board presence. The deck aims to outvalue opponents by leveraging its versatile creatures and graveyard interactions to control the game and secure victory.

The deck revolves around creating a powerful combo using Broodscale Bloodchief as the centerpiece. By utilizing cards like Ancient Stirrings, Urza's Saga, and Eldrazi Temple, the deck aims to quickly assemble the combo pieces while controlling the board with cards such as Malevolent Rumble and Glaring Fleshraker. The inclusion of cards like Blade of the Bloodchief and Emrakul, the Promised End provide additional win conditions and synergy with the primary combo. With a mix of ramp, control, and combo pieces, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful and diverse strategy.

This deck aims to quickly assemble the Amulet of Vigor and use it in combination with bounce lands like Gruul Turf and Simic Growth Chamber to generate a ton of mana. The key combo involves casting Primeval Titan to search for lands like Vesuva and bounce lands, then using them to generate even more mana to cast spells like Scapeshift and Summoner's Pact to win the game in a massive explosion of landfall triggers and huge creatures. The deck is all about explosive ramp and combo potential to overwhelm the opponent.

This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle, utilizing a combination of powerful creatures and efficient spells. By utilizing Leylines to boost the power of multicolor creatures, along with versatile removal like Lightning Bolt and Leyline Binding, this deck aims to control the board and dominate the battlefield. With a mix of control elements like Stubborn Denial and card advantage from cards like Consign to Memory, this deck is designed to maintain pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan while steadily building up its own board presence.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly defeat the opponent. The key strategy is to play cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls early on to apply pressure, while utilizing removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Solitude to clear the way for attacks. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Arena of Glory provides additional ways to pump up creatures and push for lethal damage. Overall, the deck aims to win the game quickly through a combination of creature aggression and direct damage.

This deck focuses on fast and aggressive plays, utilizing cheap and efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Cori-Steel Cutter to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It also includes cheap removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to control the board and keep momentum. The card draw and selection provided by Expressive Iteration and Mishra's Bauble help maintain card advantage and consistency in the deck. Overall, the strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with early aggression and efficient spells to secure a quick victory.

The core strategy of this deck is ramping into powerful Eldrazi creatures while controlling the board with removal spells and disruption. By quickly accelerating mana with cards like Utopia Sprawl and Eldrazi Temple, the deck can drop high-impact threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and World Breaker ahead of schedule. Kozilek's Command and Kozilek's Return provide additional removal options, while cards like Malevolent Rumble and Sire of Seven Deaths help to control the battlefield. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its powerful creatures and versatile control options.

Utilizing a combination of creature tutoring and sacrifice effects, this deck aims to assemble powerful creature combos quickly. By leveraging cards like Yawgmoth, Thran Physician and Green Sun's Zenith, the deck can search for specific creatures to create synergy and overwhelm opponents. Grist, the Hunger Tide offers additional value by creating tokens and supporting the creature toolbox strategy. The deck also includes disruption elements like Malevolent Rumble and Spymaster's Vault to control the board while setting up its combos. Overall, the deck focuses on efficiently assembling key creature combinations to secure victory.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to utilize low-cost spells and aggressive creatures to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The deck focuses on cards like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Monastery Swiftspear to apply pressure early on, while also including burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to finish off the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Preordain and Mishra's Bauble to help with card selection and maintaining speed. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient threats and direct damage.
